intro: Financial services and cryptocurrency firms bore the brunt of a concentrated phishing wave from April 8 to 26, 2026, with 50 articles logged. Threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and LockBit were observed exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893. The campaign affected sectors such as government, hospitality, and finance across Global, Latin America, Canada, Caribbean, and United States regions. Of the 50 reports, 42 were rated high severity and 8 medium.
